prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐，计算机类推荐，土 木建筑分化观望；四川省2026年物理类考生估算约32.9万人，较2025年增加约15.6%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧；福州 大学位于福建省，在四川招生占比极小（约47人/年），跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（-6.4%）及四川 省物理类考生大幅增加（约+15.6%），竞争进一步加剧，结合考生规模扩大因素做有限修正；预测最低位次约27420名，区间26920–27920名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 38154 → 35075 → 32470 → 28720, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 9434 places in the past 3 years, indicating intensifying competition year by year; the baseline for 2025 is about 28720 places; the enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan for science (physics category) was 47 students each year from 2022 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 44 students, a reduction of about 6.4% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition due to the reduced plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 77th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), with a stable ranking in the 70–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; during the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), but the impact was limited; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', with no obvious abnormal popularity; no record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry received an A- rating, the only A- or above discipline at the university, closely related to the chemical engineering and materials science enrollment majors, providing some support for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended with high social popularity, Computer Science is recommended, Civil Engineering and Architecture are differentiated and wait-and-see; the estimated number of physics category candidates in Sichuan Province for 2026 is about 329,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion in the candidate pool, intensifying overall competition; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, with a very small enrollment proportion in Sichuan (about 47 students per year), and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-6.4%), and the significant increase in physics category candidates in Sichuan Province (about +15.6%), competition further intensifies, with limited correction based on the expansion of the candidate pool; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27420, with a range of 26920 to 27920.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 26920 to 27920, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<26920), you can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>27920), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Fujian-Taiwan cooperation majors have higher tuition fees (about 15,000 yuan per year), so family financial conditions should be considered.
